description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in a buttoned, collared shirt with a visible chest pocket and a patch or insignia on the left side, paired with straight-cut trousers. The shirt appears to be of a uniform style, suggesting a professional or institutional role, and is worn over the trousers. The figure has medium-length hair that is slightly wavy and covers the ears, with a natural, unstyled look. The hands are extended horizontally to the sides, and the feet are positioned together, giving a neutral, upright stance. The shoes are simple and closed-toe, suitable for walking or standing for extended periods.
description: An adult male in a uniform-style shirt and straight trousers, standing upright with arms extended. The figure has medium-length hair and wears simple closed-toe shoes.
description_view_0: Front view shows the collared shirt with a chest pocket and insignia, arms extended, and facial features visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the shirt's fit, and the straight cut of the trousers.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the shirt and trousers, with hair length and shape visible.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile and the arm's extension.
attribute_clothing_type: buttoned collared shirt with chest pocket and insignia, straight-cut trousers
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
attribute_hairstyle: medium-length wavy hair covering the ears
